About Me

Why Karan

I'm on a mission to give every local business a website that's as good as they are.

Why I do this

I started doing this because I was tired of seeing great local businesses held back by terrible websites. A master barber with 15 years of experience shouldn't be losing customers to a competitor with a better Wix template. A nail artist doing incredible work shouldn't be invisible on Google because their site loads in 6 seconds. I use the same technology stack that powers billion-dollar startups — Astro, Vercel, modern CSS — and package it into a service that local business owners can actually afford. The result: sites that load in under a second, rank on Google, and turn visitors into bookings.

What makes me different

Speed as a Feature

My sites average 0.3 second load times. WordPress averages 4.2 seconds. That difference means more visitors stay, more bookings happen, and Google ranks you higher.

No Monthly Website Tax

Most agencies charge $200-500/month for hosting a slow WordPress site. My hosting costs are near-zero because sites are static and served from a CDN.

Built to Rank

Perfect Lighthouse scores, semantic HTML, structured data, and local SEO optimization aren't add-ons — they're built into every site from day one.

Real Design, Not Templates

While I use a curated template library for efficiency, every site is customized to your brand. Your customers will think it was designed from scratch.

Let's Go

Ready to stop losing
customers to a bad website?

Book a free 15-minute call. I'll audit your current site, show you what you're missing, and give you a clear plan — whether you hire me or not.

Book Your Free Call
Free audit · No pressure · 15 minutes
